description: 3 service-area businesses with no storefrontAddress — only serviceArea with regionCode. Tests location parser doesn't assume storefront fields are always present. Businesses: plumbing, HVAC, and landscaping.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev001
200000001.comment: Fixed our burst pipe at 11pm on a Wednesday. Didn't upcharge for emergency hours. Technician was clean, fast, and explained exactly what had failed and why. Cannot recommend highly enough.

reviewReply.comment: Grace, burst pipes never wait for business hours and neither do we. So glad we could prevent further water damage. Stay warm! 🚿

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev002
200000001.comment: Called about a slow drain and they diagnosed a partial blockage in the main line. The hydro-jetting cleared it completely. Transparent pricing before the job started. Professional team.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev003
200000001.comment: Third time using ProTrades Plumbing and they've never let me down. Water heater replacement was done in 3 hours, they hauled away the old unit, and the new one works perfectly. Loyalty well earned.

reviewReply.comment: Iris, three jobs and counting — thank you for the loyalty! Your water heater should last you another decade. ♨️

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev004
200000001.comment: Job was completed but left my bathroom in worse shape than they found it. Grout on the wall, dirty boot prints on the floor, a pipe wrench nick on the baseboard. The work itself was fine but the cleanup was not.

reviewReply.comment: Jack, that is absolutely unacceptable — our team should leave every home cleaner than we found it. We'd like to send someone to fix that baseboard. Please contact us directly.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev005
200000001.comment: Shower remodel plumbing done perfectly the first time. I've had plumbers make mistakes before that led to leaks months later. These guys used quality fittings and pressure-tested everything before leaving. Proper workmanship.

reviewReply.comment: Karen, pressure-testing is non-negotiable for us — it's the only way to be sure. Thank you for recognizing proper craftsmanship! 🔧

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev006
200000001.comment: Responsive and punctual. The job (fixing a running toilet) was straightforward and done correctly. Price felt high for the work involved but I needed it done quickly so I accepted it.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev007
200000001.comment: Emergency call on a holiday weekend — garbage disposal shredded something and was jammed. They came out within 90 minutes, fixed it, and didn't charge holiday rates. Honest and reliable.

reviewReply.comment: Maria, holiday weekends are when you need us most! Standard rates apply all year for us. Enjoy the long weekend! 🎉

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev001
200000002.comment: AC went out during the July heat wave and ProTrades had a technician to us in 4 hours. Diagnosed a failed capacitor, replaced it on the spot, system back up. Lifesavers literally — it was 96 degrees.

reviewReply.comment: Nathan, HVAC emergencies in the summer are our busiest time — glad we got to you fast! Stay cool! ❄️

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev002
200000002.comment: Annual HVAC maintenance was thorough. Technician checked everything, replaced filters, found a worn belt I wasn't aware of and replaced it preventively. Fair price for a comprehensive service.

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev003
200000002.comment: New furnace installation done in one day. The team was meticulous — covered all surfaces, tested every register, programmed the thermostat, and walked me through the warranty registration. Exceptional professionalism.

reviewReply.comment: Patrick, furnace days are long days for our crew but getting you through the winter is worth it. Warm house, happy family! 🔥

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev004
200000002.comment: Responsive company but the technician who came out didn't have the right part and had to reschedule for a second visit. Lost a day of work waiting. Would have preferred better inventory coordination.

reviewReply.comment: Quinn, you're right — that's a logistics failure on our end. We've since stocked up the most common replacement parts in all our vans. Thank you for the feedback.

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev005
200000002.comment: Mini-split installation for our home office went smoothly. Clean wiring, tidy mounting, and they were respectful of the workspace throughout. Efficient job.

200000003.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000003/reviews/rev001
200000003.comment: Lawn has never looked better after their biweekly care program. They noticed I had a grub issue starting in the back corner before I did and treated it immediately. Proactive and professional.

reviewReply.comment: Sam, catching grubs early is the difference between a minor treatment and a full lawn replacement. We keep our eyes open! 🌿

200000003.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000003/reviews/rev002
200000003.comment: Spring cleanup was thorough — edging, aeration, overseeding, mulching all done in one visit by a 3-person crew. Efficient and tidy. Neighbours have already asked for the contact.

reviewReply.comment: Tara, a lawn that generates referrals is our best advertisement! Pass our number along. 🌱

200000003.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000003/reviews/rev003
200000003.comment: Crew showed up 2 hours late without calling. When they did arrive, the hedge trimming was uneven on one side. When I pointed it out they fixed it but seemed annoyed. Punctuality and attitude need work.

reviewReply.comment: Uma, two complaints in one review and both are valid. Late arrivals should always come with a call. We spoke with the crew lead. We'd like to earn back your confidence.

200000003.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000003/reviews/rev004
200000003.comment: Tree removal of a massive oak was handled safely, professionally, and efficiently. 5-person crew, full cleanup including chipping the branches and hauling the trunk. Quoted fairly and came in on budget.

reviewReply.comment: Victor, big tree removals require big teams and careful planning — glad it went smoothly! That oak lived a good life. 🌳
